name: Nguyen Trung Nguyen
tagline: AI Engineer at Viettel Cyber Security · Research Assistant at UET-VNU
bio: I am a final-year Information Technology student at VNU University of Engineering and Technology (UET), currently working as an AI Engineer at Viettel Cyber Security.
My focus is on scalable AI systems — particularly RAG pipelines, multi-agent architectures, and intelligent agent frameworks for real-world enterprise environments.
I also do research at the Information Technology Lab (UET) on DeepResearch Agents and finance-domain RAG systems. I care about building AI that is both practically useful and technically rigorous.

education.title: B.S. in Information Technology
